excluded: creation of a runnable live-submit command
a noisy-hardware robustness or auditability conclusion
supported: exact reduced-scope credit attestation phrase intake
credit attestation is bounded to Stage199 reduced scope and the current recorded USD cap
attestation remains separate from exact live approval and live-runner preparation

intake_items.description: Stage199 must present the reduced-scope cost estimate before any attestation phrase can be accepted.
Only the exact reduced-scope credit attestation phrase can record human credit allowance verification.

evidence.required_attestation_phrase: ATTEST IBM CREDIT FOR REDUCED SCOPE STAGE199 WITH 100 USD CAP

intake_items.description: Accepted attestation means IBM account allowance and willingness to spend within the reduced-scope cap only.
This gate never prepares or runs hardware; exact live approval remains a later separate gate.

next_gate: If the exact attestation phrase is accepted, rerun Stage199 with human_credit_allowance_verified=true and then perform reduced-scope exact approval review. Do not prepare a live runner from this gate alone.
objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap-RoPE's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.
required_attestation_phrase: ATTEST IBM CREDIT FOR REDUCED SCOPE STAGE199 WITH 100 USD CAP
